---
title: "Francis Brandt"
---

## Francis Brandt

**Dates:** (1839/40-1925)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i>, judge of the High Court of Madras

### Biography

See <i>Alumni Oxonienses</i> ; his  obituary <i>The Times</i> (18 July 1925) 14.  He is remembered by cricketers: www.cricinfo.com.

### Letters

- Letter from Jany 21st [1865]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
